span.p: Wilson Score CI vs Sample Size

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
N=50: ±14pp — a 4pp gain is invisible
N=200: ±7pp — a 4pp gain is marginal
N=500: ±4pp — a 4pp gain is detectable
N=2000: ±2pp — a 2pp gain is reliable
Rule: do not claim improvement until CIs do not overlap

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Position bias (10–20% swing in pairwise)
Score both A vs B AND B vs A
Take consensus; flag disagreements

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Length bias (~5–10% toward longer text)
Include length as rubric covariate
or use length-matched comparison

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Self-bias (~5% toward same model family)
Use a DIFFERENT model family as judge
or ensemble multiple judge families

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Judge model reads rubric + candidate output
'reason then score' (chain-of-thought first)
Likert / pairwise / binary rating

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Format compliance
→ Rule-based
→ javascript / not-contains / regex

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Classification / extraction / translation
→ Reference-based
→ similar-to / levenshtein / cost

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Open-ended generation / conversation / faithfulness
→ Model-graded
→ llm-rubric / model-graded
